form.formComment: Colt by Satono Aladdin on debut. Won a jump-out at Cranbourne on March 23. Should take some beating first time out.

form.formComment: Gelding by Wooded making his first appearance. Was runner-up in a jump-out at Cranbourne on March 23. Watch the betting.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Gelding by Wooded making his first appearance. Was runner-up in a jump-out at Cranbourne on March 23. Watch the betting.

form.formComment: At debut, 7th of 12 at Pakenham 2yo Mdn-Sw on March 19 over 1100m, on a slow track; 4.5 len behind Chapados with 58kg at $8.50. See again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(1). At debut, 7th of 12 at Pakenham 2yo Mdn-Sw on March 19 over 1100m, on a slow track; 4.5 len behind Chapados with 58kg at $8.50. See again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin. Raced keenly in the early and middle stages.

form.formComment: Returns to racing after only one start. Back after six months break. At debut last start did the work up front then tired ran last of 9 at Caulfield in the LR Debutant Stks on October 15 over 1000m, 6 len behind Torture with 58kg at $61. Had five recent trials to get fit for this. Last trial won a Werribee jump-out on March 27. See how he returns.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0.5). Returns to racing after only one start. Back after six months break. At debut last start did the work up front then tired ran last of 9 at Caulfield in the LR Debutant Stks on October 15 over 1000m, 6 len behind Torture with 58kg at $61. Had five recent trials to get fit for this. Last trial won a Werribee jump-out on March 27. See how he returns.

form.formComment: Jumped at very long odds at debut, 4th of 10 at Morphettville in the LR Deq Stks on March 28 over 1050m, 5 len behind Never Ordinary with 56kg at $61. Prefer to see again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-6.5). Jumped at very long odds at debut, 4th of 10 at Morphettville in the LR Deq Stks on March 28 over 1050m, 5 len behind Never Ordinary with 56kg at $61. Prefer to see again.

form.formComment: At debut, 4th in a small field at Flemington in the G3 Tbred Breeders on March 28 over 1200m, on a wet track; 7 len behind Satono Glow carrying 56kg at $21. Better placed here, look for a much improved effort.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-9). At debut, 4th in a small field at Flemington in the G3 Tbred Breeders on March 28 over 1200m, on a wet track; 7 len behind Satono Glow carrying 56kg at $21. Better placed here, look for a much improved effort.

form.formComment: Filly by Doubtland facing the starter for the first time. Ran 3rd in a trial at Caulfield Heath over 800m on March 26. Facing a stiff test.

formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Filly by Doubtland facing the starter for the first time. Ran 3rd in a trial at Caulfield Heath over 800m on March 26. Facing a stiff test.

form.formComment: At debut, 2nd in a small field at Geelong 2yo F Mdn-Sw on April 1 over 1100m, neck behind Mistifyzou with 57kg at $8. Can improve off that and will take plenty of beating.

form.formComment: Filly by Russian Revolution on debut. Won trial at Caulfield Heath over 800m on March 26. Is trialling well and should run a big race.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Filly by Russian Revolution on debut. Won trial at Caulfield Heath over 800m on March 26. Is trialling well and should run a big race.

form.formComment: Third race start. First start second last of 9 at Caulfield in the LR Debutant Stks on October 15 over 1000m, 5.5 len behind Torture with 56kg at $9. Went for a break before returning 6th of 8 at Flemington in the LR Festival on February 28 over 1000m, 7 len behind Gin Twist with 55kg at $5.50. Can improve and figure in the finish.
